phases.title: Geometric fidelity contract
acceptance: mean IoU is at least 0.990 on the qualified corpus
p05 IoU is at least 0.980 so aggregate scores cannot hide weak cases
normalized symmetric Hausdorff distance is at most 0.005
topology mismatch count is zero for every qualified case
missing metrics, non-finite values, corpus shrinkage or threshold regression fails closed

phases.title: Edge and curve quality
acceptance: mean edge F-score is at least 0.990
p05 edge F-score is at least 0.980
p95 normalized tangent error is at most 0.020
p95 normalized curvature error is at most 0.030
open contour, self-intersection and cusp regression counts are zero
missing, duplicate, non-finite, out-of-range or shrinking evidence fails closed

phases.title: Color fidelity
acceptance: mean perceptual color score is at least 0.990
p05 perceptual color score is at least 0.980
p95 normalized Delta E is at most 0.020
palette omission, palette duplication and transparency mismatch counts are zero
missing, duplicate, non-finite, out-of-range or shrinking evidence fails closed

phases.title: Typography and fine detail
acceptance: mean glyph fidelity score is at least 0.990
p05 glyph fidelity score is at least 0.980
p95 normalized stroke-width error is at most 0.020
missing glyph, merged glyph, broken counter and lost fine-detail counts are zero
missing, duplicate, non-finite, out-of-range or shrinking evidence fails closed
